failure.symptom: Kaneo is a monorepo (Hono API + React frontend) requiring PostgreSQL database + AUTH_SECRET. Cannot run without database. Bug confirmed via source code: create-project-modal.tsx Key input field lacks maxLength attribute, allowing unlimited input that overflows modal layout. Fix adds maxLength={8}.
attempted: Source code analysis of buggy vs fix commit
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 PostgreSQL + AUTH_SECRET。Bug 简单明确：Key 输入框缺 maxLength={8}
